generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our security? Those days are over. Our strategic autonomy isn't just about strength—it's about fairness. Every nation should stand on its own feet. Look at how our neighbors are stepping up. It's time we do the same. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
